name: S6_expr_ctrlflow_pack
description: Standalone runner with ten tests (expressions + control flow): arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, assignments, loops, goto, conditional, comma, else. Int‑only params. Returns bitmap of failing tests; 255/254 for no args/unknown name.

commands: [[debug,result=64]]./s6 goto:-1 arithmetic:5,2 relational:5,2 logical:1,0 bitwise:6,3 assignments:10 loops:5,2,3 conditional:5,3,10,20 comma:3,4 else:0,1,5

io_hint: Process every token through the same pipeline and accumulate bits; outcomes must be independent of argument order. The failure of a single test must stem only from its parsed input (no special-casing or external state) and produce the same bitmap across permutations.
